name: ChainForge
summary: Compose multi-primitive RAPP chain plans from natural-language prompts AND plant fresh public seeds (neighborhoods OR twins) end-to-end. The 'design + create' rapplication: turn an ambitious idea into a real grail-compliant artifact.
tagline: Design the chain. Plant the seed. Operator approves; ChainForge ships.
_note: Two intents in one singleton: intent='compose' calls claude CLI to build a rapp-chain-plan/1.0 envelope from the operator's prompt + the canonical RAPP toolbox. intent='plant' uses tools/holo_card_generator + tools/front_door_specs + gh CLI to spin up a fresh public planted seed (neighborhood OR twin), grail-complete, ready for use. Default dry_run=True for both intents — operator-mediated by design.
